title: clerodendrum trichotomum f. ferrugineum
intro: Clerodendrum trichotomum f. ferrugineum, also known as the Iron Glory Bower, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its iron-hued foliage and vibrant purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Clerodendrum trichotomum f. ferrugineum include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and anti-asthmatic agent. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
